stack: Automated testing tools, Agile, Software Testing, QA metrics
points_positifs: Poste Associate (Junior) correspondant parfaitement à l'expérience du candidat
Forte dimension automatisation et amélioration des processus
Entreprise dans le secteur Retail/E-commerce à Singapour
points_negatifs: Le candidat n'a pas un profil 'pure QA', son expérience est plus orientée Software Engineering
commentaire: Une excellente opportunité pour un profil junior. L'accent mis par RateS sur l'amélioration de l'efficacité via les outils d'automatisation permet de valoriser les projets personnels et l'expérience chez EXAIL.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Test Engineer role at RateS. Your focus on maintaining testing frameworks and improving efficiency through new tools aligns perfectly with my background in automating complex workflows.

At EXAIL Robotics, I develop core features in C++ and JavaScript. I also redesigned our installation process. It used to take about 2 days, but now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. This practical experience in identifying bottlenecks and building scripts to solve them is exactly what I want to bring to your QA processes.

On the side, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack React platform. It uses a daily scraper for 1,300+ listings and an AI agent to calculate price estimates. Managing these data pipelines taught me how to track metrics and ensure system reliability under real conditions.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering (2026). I've followed the growth of RateS in the social commerce space and would love to help ensure the quality of your platform as you scale.

Aodren Gloux
